message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.pivot (1 case)

Append 1 live-pandas oracle test covering DataFrame.pivot:

- pivot_basic: 4-row long-form frame with 2 distinct rows × 2
  distinct columns × 1 value column, reshapes to a 2x2 wide-form
  frame. Verifies pivot's index/columns/values triplet without any
  aggregation (raises on dup pairs).

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.pivot(index, columns, values)), runs the Rust DataFrame.pivot(
index_col, columns_col, values_col), and asserts parity via
compare_dataframe_expected. DataFramePivot was already wired through
the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-h6a6c]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
